Third-party software bundled into ch_diag self-contained HTML reports.

Apache ECharts 6.1.0
Source: https://www.npmjs.com/package/echarts/v/6.1.0
License: Apache-2.0
Copyright 2017-2026 The Apache Software Foundation
The complete Apache-2.0 license, NOTICE, and BSD-3-Clause license for embedded
d3 components are distributed beside this file and embedded into every HTML
report.

highlight.js 11.11.1
Source: https://www.npmjs.com/package/highlight.js/v/11.11.1
License: BSD-3-Clause
The complete BSD-3-Clause license is distributed beside this file and embedded
into every HTML report.
